summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs were routed item-by-item; non-security PRs were kept as independent maintainer-review or author-follow-up work because merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked in this job.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with proof and active maintainer-review path; no closure or merge action is allowed or justified in this inventory shard.
Independent open PR with proof and no hydrated duplicate/supersession evidence; merge/fix actions are blocked for this job.
Independent narrow PR with passing proof; keep for normal maintainer review outside this inventory cleanup.
Security-sensitive item per hydrated preflight; out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Security-sensitive bootstrap-token race PR with unresolved maintainer/security-review concerns; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Security-sensitive by hydrated preflight; no Clownfish close, merge, label, comment, or fix action should be planned.
Focused useful PR tied to a live issue; keep as independent maintainer/rebase work rather than close or merge in this plan-mode inventory.
Independent open PR with sufficient proof and no closeout evidence; merge is not available in this job.
Security-sensitive plugin code-safety PR; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Open contributor PR with unresolved author/maintainer follow-up and a failing check; keep independent rather than close or merge.
